QA-16 -001 MEDIUM P2
Failed: Test qa16 core web vitals
🔗 https://dev.mehadedu.com/en 🧪 test_qa16_core_web_vitals 🕐 2026-05-22 04:21:06 ⏱ 15.01s
📋 What this test was checking
Core Web Vitals must all be within budget for a passing user experience. Logs all values so the team sees actuals even on pass — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en. Test parameters: homepage_en, https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
🧪 Test data used
params: [homepage_en, https://dev.mehadedu.com/en]
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Use these parameters: homepage_en, https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  3. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Core Web Vitals must all be within budget for a passing user
✗ What actually happened
The test could not load the page within 15000ms — the server is too slow or unreachable.
Proof of Concept — Screenshot (annotated with bug)
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
⬇ Download .webm

Core Web Vitals must all be within budget for a passing user experience. Logs all values so the team sees actuals even on pass — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en. Test parameters: find_tutors, https://dev.mehadedu.com/en/find, tutors.

params: [find_tutors, https://dev.mehadedu.com/en/find, tutors]

  2. Use these parameters: find_tutors, https://dev.mehadedu.com/en/find, tutors
  3. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
✓ What should happen
Core Web Vitals must all be within budget for a passing user
